title: Branches, Integration, and Merge Evidence · Graph Retrieval
summary: Integrate a short-lived change while preserving understandable topology and verifying both file content and combined behavior. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a branch-and-merge topology lab after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create, list, rename, copy, delete, and inspect branches as movable references with upstream metadata.
Switch branches only after predicting working-tree/index carryover, untracked collisions, and sparse or worktree constraints.
Find merge bases and explain three-way integration from two tips and their best common ancestor.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# git-basics cumulative repository evidence notebook
# Git operations change only disposable simulated repository state.
# Inspect status, diffs, graph, refs, and recovery before every mutation.

steps.title: Branch Reference · changed case
steps.instruction:
review case — Branches main and repair diverge from merge base b00b1e5. repair changes validation while main changes output formatting; predict fast-forward possibility, resulting parents, and post-merge behavior evidence.

Which action demonstrates Branch Reference without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for create, list, rename, copy, delete, and inspect branches as movable references with upstream metadata.

A branch contains a private copy of every project file. This does not resolve branch reference · changed case.

For branch reference · changed case, apply Branch Reference without its stated preconditions, omit the a branch-and-merge topology lab trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Branch Reference for a branch-and-merge topology lab.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Post Merge Verification, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write the review evidence note for Post Merge Verification: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Branches main and repair diverge from merge base b00b1e5. repair changes validation while main changes output formatting; predict fast-forward possibility, resulting parents, and post-merge behavior evidence. Competency probe: Verify merged tree, combined tests, log topology, diff range, and push target before publishing integration.
steps.why: Retrieving Post Merge Verification through the concrete a branch-and-merge topology lab case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Verify merged tree, combined tests, log topology, diff range, and push target before publishing integration.
